text:
On Sat, May 20, 2000 at 11:05:42AM -0700, wolman@cs.washington.edu wrote:
> >Description:
> I have updated the AbiWord port from version 0.7.6 to version 0.7.9.
> I attempted to contact the maintainer, but have received no
> response for a couple of weeks.

Wanna be maintainer?  I do not think anyone will have any valid
objections if I simply revoke dburr's MAINTAINER; I imagine he's too
busy to maintain the port anyway.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
